About This Property

A rare commercial showroom plot on the main arterial road of Sector 82 — the IT City corridor. Surrounded by corporate offices, tech parks, and high-density residential sectors. Ideal for showroom, clinic, or retail investment. Exceptional rental yield potential.

Key Features

◈Main Road Frontage
◈IT City Corridor
◈High Footfall
◈Corner Plot
◈Clear Title
◈Bank Loan Eligible
